title: Complete onboarding and reach dashboard as a new user
description: Verifies a signed-in new user can complete required onboarding fields and land on the dashboard with access to the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Click the sign-in continuation control to proceed into the app
Wait for the app to finish navigation after sign-in
Fill a valid full name into the name field
Select a role in the role selector
Fill a valid company name into the company field
Submit the onboarding form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Complete onboarding and access role-based dashboard
description: Verifies a signed-in new user can complete onboarding with name, role, and company and then reach the dashboard showing the correct role-based view and permitted actions.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /onboarding
Fill a valid full name into the name field
Select a role
Fill a valid company name into the company field
Submit the profile setup form
Click to go to the dashboard
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify role-specific actions and sections are visible for the selected role

title: View leads on dashboard and filter by status
description: Verifies the dashboard lead list loads and filtering by status updates the visible lead results without crashing.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Click the sign-in continuation control to proceed into the app
Wait for the app to finish navigation after sign-in
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Select a lead status filter value
Verify the lead list is displayed

title: Open a lead and review qualification and enrichment details
description: Verifies a user can open a lead from the dashboard and see lead context including qualification and enrichment information.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Click the sign-in continuation control to proceed into the app
Wait for the app to finish navigation after sign-in
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Click a lead from the lead list to open its details
Verify lead qualification and enrichment data are displayed

title: Onboarding persists and does not reappear after completion
description: Verifies that after completing onboarding, revisiting the app does not require re-entering profile details and the user can access the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /onboarding
Fill a valid full name into the name field
Select a role
Fill a valid company name into the company field
Submit the profile setup form
Click to go to the dashboard
Navigate to /onboarding
Verify the user is not prompted to complete onboarding again
Verify the user can access the dashboard view appropriate to their role

title: Import leads from CSV and see them in the dashboard list
description: Verifies a user can upload a CSV, map columns, submit the import, and then see imported leads appear in the lead list.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Click the sign-in continuation control to proceed into the app
Wait for the app to finish navigation after sign-in
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Click the CSV import entry point
Select a valid CSV file in the file picker
Map CSV columns to the required lead fields
Submit the import
Verify imported leads are displayed in the lead list

title: Review AI draft, edit, and send outreach successfully
description: Verifies a user can review an AI-generated draft, edit it, send the email, and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Click the sign-in continuation control to proceed into the app
Wait for the app to finish navigation after sign-in
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Click a lead from the lead list to open its details
Scroll to the AI outreach draft section
Fill updated content into the outreach message editor
Send the outreach email
Verify a send-success confirmation is visible

title: Onboarding required fields validation and recovery
description: Verifies onboarding prevents submission when required fields are missing and allows completion after providing the missing information.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /onboarding
Select a role
Submit the profile setup form
Verify required-field validation errors are visible
Fill a valid full name into the name field
Fill a valid company name into the company field
Submit the profile setup form
Verify the user can access the dashboard after successful onboarding

title: Open an imported lead to confirm details display after import
description: Verifies that after a CSV import, an imported lead can be opened and its detail fields and enrichment context are visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Click the sign-in continuation control to proceed into the app
Wait for the app to finish navigation after sign-in
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Click the CSV import entry point
Select a valid CSV file in the file picker
Map CSV columns to the required lead fields
Submit the import
Click an imported lead from the refreshed lead list
Verify the lead detail view displays lead context fields

title: Lead list and detail view render a lead phone value without breaking
description: Verifies phone data can be displayed on the dashboard and lead detail view without UI crashes or missing content.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Click the sign-in continuation control to proceed into the app
Wait for the app to finish navigation after sign-in
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Click a lead that shows a phone field in the list
Verify the lead detail view shows contact fields including phone when available

title: Cliente can open a lead and consume context without prohibited controls
description: Verifies a Cliente can open a lead from the dashboard and view lead context while restricted controls are not available.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /onboarding
Fill a valid full name into the name field
Select the Cliente role
Fill a valid company name into the company field
Submit the profile setup form
Click to go to the dashboard
Click a lead in the lead list to open its details
Verify lead context and qualification/enrichment information is displayed
Verify prohibited controls are not available on the lead detail view

title: Cliente role restricts actions on dashboard
description: Verifies a Cliente sees a limited dashboard view with prohibited actions not available after completing onboarding as Cliente.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /onboarding
Fill a valid full name into the name field
Select the Cliente role
Fill a valid company name into the company field
Submit the profile setup form
Click to go to the dashboard
Verify administrative and outreach actions are not available for the restricted role
Verify the dashboard still allows viewing lead information

title: Triage by opening multiple leads from a filtered subset
description: Verifies a user can filter to a subset of leads and open multiple lead detail views sequentially without losing access to triage.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Click the sign-in continuation control to proceed into the app
Wait for the app to finish navigation after sign-in
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Select a lead status filter value
Click a lead from the filtered lead list to open its details
Click the control to return to the lead list
Click a different lead from the filtered lead list to open its details
Verify the second lead detail view is displayed

title: Admin role shows administrative permissions on dashboard
description: Verifies an Admin sees admin-only controls and sections on the dashboard after completing onboarding as Admin.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /onboarding
Fill a valid full name into the name field
Select the Admin role
Fill a valid company name into the company field
Submit the profile setup form
Click to go to the dashboard
Verify admin-only controls are available on the dashboard
Verify the dashboard lead list area is visible

title: Vendedor/SDR role shows seller workflow permissions on dashboard
description: Verifies a Vendedor/SDR sees seller workflow controls on the dashboard after completing onboarding as Vendedor/SDR.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /onboarding
Fill a valid full name into the name field
Select the Vendedor/SDR role
Fill a valid company name into the company field
Submit the profile setup form
Click to go to the dashboard
Verify seller workflow actions are available on the dashboard
Verify the dashboard provides access to open a lead from the list

title: Fix CSV mapping when required columns are missing and successfully import
description: Verifies the import mapping step shows validation when required fields are unmapped and allows correcting the mapping to complete import.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Click the sign-in continuation control to proceed into the app
Wait for the app to finish navigation after sign-in
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Click the CSV import entry point
Select a CSV file that lacks one or more required columns
Attempt to submit the import with required fields unmapped
Adjust the mapping to satisfy required lead fields
Resubmit the import
Verify imported leads are displayed in the lead list

title: Reject inaccurate AI draft, correct it, and send outreach
description: Verifies a user can mark an AI draft as inaccurate, edit the content, send the email, and see confirmation that outreach was sent.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Click the sign-in continuation control to proceed into the app
Wait for the app to finish navigation after sign-in
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Click a lead from the lead list to open its details
Scroll to the AI outreach draft section
Mark the draft as inaccurate using the provided control
Fill corrected content into the outreach message editor
Send the outreach email
Verify a send-success confirmation is visible
